acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.
testHints: phase-05 source grep found no zoom, EXIF, bitmap decode, gesture detector, gallery preview, or image metadata flow in app/src/main/java
phase-05 source grep found no ACTION_SEND, FileProvider, ContentResolver, MediaStore, file picker, or SAF calls in app/src/main/java

implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.
testHints: phase-05 source grep found no zoom, EXIF, bitmap decode, gesture detector, gallery preview, or image metadata flow in app/src/main/java
phase-05 source grep found no ACTION_SEND, FileProvider, ContentResolver, MediaStore, file picker, or SAF calls in app/src/main/java

matchedGroups.title: Detail state, menu grouping, and toggles
requiredBehaviors: Menu list partitions into recommended, veg, and non-veg views.
Expansion toggles update immediately without leaving the page.
Selected restaurant details render from shared state rather than route-only stubs.
riskHints: Seed may overstate file access/image viewer capability from static resource usage; confirm before closing capability rows.
uiContracts: restaurant card followed by expandable menu sections
floating cart action when menu count sum is non-zero

matchedGroups.title: Cart summary and mutation surfaces
requiredBehaviors: Zero-count items are hidden from the rendered list.
Coupon, delivery, and bill sections remain visible.
Mutation affordances must not be silently removed even if source callbacks are placeholders.
riskHints: Source cart mutation callbacks are empty; parity may require a small clarified target behavior rather than no-op buttons hidden from UI.
uiContracts: item list, coupon bar, delivery section, bill section

phaseGroupIndex.title: Platform capability: File access, document permissions, and share URIs
Platform capability: Image viewer gestures and metadata

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.

capabilityRows.capability: File access, document permissions, and share URIs
capabilityRows.targetApiOrLibrary: HarmonyOS Cangjie AbilityKit Want/URI APIs (`ohos.app.ability.want.Want`, `ohos.app.ability.want_constant.Flags`) exist for real cross-app URI/file sharing, but phase-05 detail/cart source behavior does not invoke them.

HarmonyOS Cangjie ArkUI `Image` and ImageKit `ohos.multimedia.image.createImageSource(String)` exist for real image display/processing, but phase-05 detail/cart source behavior only needs static packaged-image rendering.

riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.
